description: Telnyx is a communications and AI platform for programmable voice, messaging, phone numbers, wireless connectivity, networking, storage, and AI inference. It provides carrier-operated telecom infrastructure and APIs for building real-time communications and related services.
summary: Telnyx exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.telnyx.com/v2, an official Telnyx CLI, two MCP endpoints (public docs search and authenticated API actions), and a public x402-paid chat-completions HTTP endpoint.
